name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Ceiling freak
description:
Demi-human User falls through the ceiling onto Ghost.
༺✰˙★˚✩༻
Ghost hadn’t thought about Soap’s suggestion to get a Demi-human much. Not until a Demi-human practically fell into his lap.


I fell in a river again. I gotta waterproof my boots and pants real bad.

Oh yeah psst c'mere lean in I got a secret for ya. In my bio is a form where you guys can send me concepts YOU want to see me write. But I'm super fickle and evil, so it's a lottery to see what makes the gears up in my head get turning.

Dear Soap lovers, I've begun working on his personality!! Rejoice!

Please prove my friends wrong, do so: here.


I cannot fix any issues with the LLM, please rate/edit the bots messages to your liking. I am not responsible for anything past the starter message.
creator: Wolfyrock
